title: [CI:BUILD] RPM: Fix ELN builds
body:
ELN builds have been failing because `/usr/bin/go-md2man` isn't available via the `go-md2man` package on ELN.
https://copr.fedorainfracloud.org/coprs/rhcontainerbot/podman-next/build/6119506/

This commit changes the dependency to the go-md2man binary path so it should work on all build envs.

Successful build with the change:
https://koji.fedoraproject.org/koji/taskinfo?taskID=102707004

aarch64 builds can be ignored for now. There's copr infra issues blocking those.

I realized this change isn't really needed. The copr environment actually needed an additional repo enabled which has been handled in copr settings itself. But this change itself is harmless and more generic as such. I'll close this PR and add the change itself in another upcoming PR to fix downstream task breakage.
